Privacy Policy

Your privacy is our priority. We inform you about how we protect and manage your personal data.

  1. Home
  2. Privacy
Last updated: February 6, 2026

Data Protection - RumboMed

In compliance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR), we detail the processing of your personal data.

1. Data Controller

The entity responsible for the collection and processing of your personal data through this platform is RumboMed, operating on the Costa del Sol (Málaga, Marbella, Estepona).

Contact: info@rumbomed.com

2. Purpose of Processing

At RumboMed, we process the information provided by interested parties for the following purposes:

  • To manage booking requests for vessels and nautical experiences.
  • To respond to inquiries received through our contact channels.
  • To send commercial communications about our offers and services (only with your prior consent).

3. Lawfulness of Processing

The legal basis for processing your data is the consent of the data subject when contacting us or hiring our services, as well as compliance with legal obligations regarding nautical and tax matters.

4. Data Retention

The personal data provided will be kept as long as the commercial relationship is maintained or for the years necessary to comply with legal obligations (especially regarding boat rental contracts).

5. Your Rights

Any person has the right to obtain confirmation as to whether RumboMed is processing personal data concerning them. You have the right to:

  • Access: Access your personal data.
  • Rectification: Request the rectification of inaccurate data.
  • Erasure: Request its deletion when the data is no longer necessary.
  • Objection: Object to the processing of your data.
To exercise these rights, you may send an email to info@rumbomed.com attaching a copy of your ID or equivalent document.

6. Data Security

RumboMed applies the necessary technical and organizational measures to guarantee the security of personal data and prevent its alteration, loss, or unauthorized access, given the nature of the rental services we offer.

RumboMed Commitment

Your data will never be transferred to third parties without your express consent, except under legal obligation.
